svg.text: • 198. House Robber, 213. House Robber II — take or skip current
• 300. Longest Increasing Subsequence — O(n²) DP or O(n log n) patience
• 139. Word Break — dp[i] = is prefix of length i breakable
• 91. Decode Ways — dp[i] depends on previous one or two characters
• 1143. Longest Common Subsequence — classic 2D DP on two strings
• 72. Edit Distance — Levenshtein with insert / delete / replace
• 5 / 647. Longest Palindromic Substring / count — interval DP
• 312. Burst Balloons — interval DP with split point k
• 64. Minimum Path Sum — grid DP, dp[i][j] = top + left choice
• 188 / 309 / 714. Stock with k / cooldown / fee — state-machine DP
DP is recognising the state, not inventing the recurrence from scratch.
